title: ecc/rsa: public_key_der copies stack array to Vec unnecessarily
description: ecc.rs public_key_der and ecdh both write into a fixed stack array (91 bytes and 32 bytes respectively), then call buf[..out_len].to_vec() to return. Same pattern in ecc shared_secret. Fix: pre-allocate Vec<u8>::with_capacity(N), write via as_mut_ptr(), truncate — no intermediate stack buffer needed. rsa.rs public_key_der pre-allocates 600 bytes regardless of key size; could be sized from key_size_bytes (RSA-1024 DER is ~160 bytes, RSA-4096 is ~550 bytes).
